svg.text: decode ht_tail.csl - lm_head mesh-GEMV + top-K sampling, looped per generated token
vocab on X, hidden dim on Y. Two orthogonal 2-phase reductions reuse the SAME reduce colors (repaint + fence) - and the sampled token goes NORTH to HT_head, closing the autoregressive loop.
(1) Spatial layout: tail band 6 x 8 (ref config) + the 5 acts
(1) budget header N, then Z (per step), then STOP-Z - E->W multicast (z_drain_color, IQ0)
(2)/(3) Y 2-phase reduce: RMSNorm sumsq (+bcast) & lm_head dim-contract (no bcast) -> fp32 logits on root row
(4) X 2-phase MERGE-reduce (top-K lists, not a sum) - SAME reduce colors 1-5, repainted Y->X, fenced by the static tail_xready barrier
local top-K = size-K min-heap + SIMD block-max prune (decode runs it PER TOKEN; prefill's O(K*V) argmax passes were ~45% of the budget)
P-2 router multicast (z_drain_color, IQ0): carries the per-round budget header N (G-4 + G-13 replicated scalar), the per-step Z, and the in-band STOP-Z sentinel - one channel, three cargoes.
P-1 two-phase all-reduce on Y: RMSNorm sumsq (with bcast) + lm_head dim-contract (no bcast, widened DSD). m=1 -> all-reduce is indicated; Cannon would be wrong here.
P-1 two-phase reduce on X with a MERGE combiner (tail_topk_mergereduce_x); G-3 repaint + G-8 fence. Runs ONCE PER TOKEN in decode, not once per request.
P-6 p2p north emit: the autoregressive feedback edge decode has and prefill does not. Sampling PE is x=4, south emitter/TSC PE is x=5 - the X-broadcast between them is load-bearing.
P-6 p2p south emit: east-most root PE -> mux -> host (logits_south_color, OQ0), every step; the 8-u32 TSC burst piggybacks the same channel on the last step.
(2) Task state machine - inner loop per generated token, outer re-arm per round
read N header off IQ0; re-forward
DSD to bsz*V_pe -> logits on root row
prune over the V_pe slice; sort DESC
MERGE; bcast global topK to root row
then X-bcast the id to every root col
repaint X->Y for the next step;
north emit bsz ids (skip last step)
outer: @activate(tail_main_id) per round :1422 (kv_stream_ingress=1) - re-park on the next round's N header
TSC WINDOW (load-bearing): is_tsc_pe = (x=HT_WIDTH-1, y=root_2nd_phase) samples start at tail_step==warmup_cycles (:1316) and end at the last step (:1405).
KV injection, the budget-header exchange, tail_init and step 0 are ALL OUTSIDE that span - a decode number from this counter is steady-state per-token only, and hides KV-reload cost.
colors/queues: z_drain=IQ0 (last block's result_color) - reduce 1st/2nd + bcast = ids 1-5 on IQ/OQ 2-6 (shared Y & repainted X) - tail_xready = IQ/OQ 1 - tok_bcast = id 7 OQ7 - logits_south = OQ0.
Count-exactness = correctness (mismatch => silent hang). Fragile triples: north-emit last-step skip vs the host port budget; SOUTH_PAD (:248) vs launch.py:2168; +kv_hdr / +8*num_rounds allowances.
